purpose: Real-source European exam multiple-choice data for GRPO/RLVR and DPO pair construction.

policy.redistribute_rows_only_when: source license explicitly allows redistribution of question text
policy.link_only_when: official site publishes PDFs/questions but reuse terms are unclear or restrictive
policy.never_include: private, leaked, paywalled, or non-official exam dumps

verified_sources.name: EXAMS: Multi-subject High School Examinations Dataset
verified_sources.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 for dataset; Apache-2.0 for code
verified_sources.notes: README says the dataset contains more than 24,000 high-school exam questions and is licensed CC-BY-SA-4.0.

verified_sources.name: Högskoleprovet previous exams
verified_sources.license: official public download; redistribution not verified
verified_sources.notes: Studera/UHR says previous exam booklets and answer keys are free to download. Latest page notes UHR only has permission to show ELF English texts for one week after an exam, so do not redistribute raw text until reuse is cleared.

verified_sources.name: Polish CKE matura exam sheets
verified_sources.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
verified_sources.notes: Official CKE page lists arkusze by year for the 2023 formula.

verified_sources.name: CERMAT Czech maturita tests and assignments
verified_sources.license: official public archive with separate reuse rules
verified_sources.notes: CERMAT page says use of exam documentation for other purposes is governed by its separate rules PDF.

verified_sources.name: Högskoleprovet ORD parsed rows
verified_sources.license: unknown/missing; official PDFs state publication permission was obtained for protected material
verified_sources.notes: Builder parses only high-confidence ORD vocabulary questions with official answer keys. Filter with license_id=unknown or source_id=hogskoleprovet_ord.

verified_sources.name: LLMzSzL Polish national exams
verified_sources.license: unknown/missing on Hugging Face dataset card
verified_sources.notes: Dataset card lists 18.8k Polish rows; the paper describes a collection of Polish national exams with closed-ended questions from CKE archives.

verified_sources.name: Polish PES specialist medical exams 2007-2024
verified_sources.license: unknown/missing on Hugging Face dataset card
verified_sources.notes: Structured Polish medical specialist exam MCQs with year, season, specialty, question text/options, and answer letter. v0.3 materializes only rows with parseable A-E options and an answer.

verified_sources.name: Swedish medical exam MCQs
verified_sources.notes: Dataset card says rows come from Swedish medical exams published by Umeå University. Keep filterable until terms are reviewed.

verified_sources.name: Polish matura MCQs
verified_sources.notes: Small structured set with official CKE PDF URLs in each row. Filter out with license_id=cc-by-nc-sa-2.0 for commercial/permissive-only runs.

verified_sources.name: Slovak math/biology university-entry exams
verified_sources.notes: Structured Slovak MCQ rows from SCIO-style math/biology university-entry PDFs. Filter out with license_id=cc-by-nc-sa-2.0 for commercial/permissive-only runs.

verified_sources.name: Slovak financial certification exam
verified_sources.notes: Structured Slovak multiple-choice financial certification questions with answer labels and sector/area metadata.

verified_sources.name: Basque public-service legal exams
verified_sources.license: Open License in row metadata; exact legal terms not normalized to SPDX
verified_sources.notes: Structured Basque professional/public-service legal MCQs. Kept under custom_open_needs_review until the upstream open-license terms are normalized.

verified_sources.name: Catalan public-service legal exams
verified_sources.notes: Structured Catalan professional/public-service legal MCQs. v0.3 applies a conservative quality filter to avoid rows where PDF extraction split the stem/options incorrectly.

verified_sources.name: Global-MMLU
verified_sources.notes: Exam-style academic MCQ source, useful for broad multilingual knowledge tuning. It is not a national official exam archive.

verified_sources.name: MMMLU
verified_sources.notes: Translated MMLU test set. Use source filters if you need to avoid MMLU-family contamination.

verified_sources.name: Belebele
verified_sources.notes: Parallel multiple-choice reading comprehension, not an official exam archive.

verified_sources.name: XCOPA
verified_sources.notes: Multiple-choice causal reasoning, included for reasoning/RLVR diversity.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official federal legal text; answer key not present in catalogue HTML
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Official catalogue lists 310 approved naturalization-test questions with four options each. Do not materialize until a real official answer source is joined.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: VISC/VIAA page lists annual state examination tasks from 2013/2014 onward. Target MCQ/listening/answer-key sections first.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Official NŠA archive lists brandos exam tasks by year, including foreign-language exam packages and attachments.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official exam-board archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: WJEC/CBAC publishes past papers and mark schemes, with Welsh-language material. Parser should start with item-bank/mark-scheme pairs that are explicit MCQ.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official MATSEC archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Target SEC/Matriculation past papers with mark schemes, especially subjects with multiple-choice sections.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Državni izpitni center subject pages provide exam materials; extract only question/answer pairs with explicit answer keys.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: NCVVO archive covers Croatian state-matura materials and solutions. Parser should target closed-ended answer-sheet tasks first.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Examenblad publishes Dutch central exams and correction guidelines; likely valuable for Dutch reasoning and exact-answer tasks.

high_value_discovery_targets.license: official public archive; redistribution not verified
high_value_discovery_targets.notes: Udir exam pages are high-value for Norwegian Bokmål/Nynorsk; parser must respect login-gated material and only use public files.
